main.illegal_path_warning: [Warning] Program interrupted! Invalid path! Please do not place the program in a path containing spaces or non-ASCII characters! Please rename the path and restart.
main.gpu_warning: [Important Notice] Do not rely on Task Manager, low GPU utilization, or messages like "PaddlePaddle works on..." to determine whether the program utilizes GPU resources. Modern GPUs are designed for extreme computational efficiency, typically capable of processing thousands of image tasks per second, making low utilization rates a normal occurrence. To verify hardware resource allocation, please compare execution time differences between the CPU and GPU versions. Submit feedback only if the runtime durations are comparable.
